summary: Comprehensive frontend testing completed for Dishu Studio website with updated light theme design and gallery showcase features
passed_tests: Home page gallery displays 25 photos in 5x5 grid layout
Hanging photo frame effect with golden pins visible on all gallery items
Gallery item clicks successfully open lightbox modal
Lightbox displays 4 related photos in 2x2 grid format
Lightbox shows couple/baby details (name, event, location, style/age, theme, type)
Lightbox closes via X button, click outside, and ESC key
Services page Wedding gallery shows 25 items in 5x5 grid
Services page Baby gallery shows 25 items in 5x5 grid with baby information
Background is pure white (#FFFFFF) throughout the site
No heavy dark overlays present - light theme implementation correct
Logo color accents (golden yellow) properly applied to buttons and hover states
Mobile responsive design - galleries change to 2 columns on mobile devices
Navigation menu works correctly on both desktop and mobile
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
